name: cdisc-case-3
description: Skills for the CDISC Case 3 full USDM->TLF pipeline: tlf-planner (USDM -> required TLF list), tlf-plan-critic (independent audit), tlf-analysis-spec (analysis + ADaM specs), sdtm-to-adam (spec-driven ADaM derivation), tlf-generator (ARD via cards/cardx -> rendered TLFs), traceability-builder (interactive objective->endpoint->SDTM->ADaM->TLF explorer), and propose-skill-lesson (the generalized self-learning loop that refines these skills from reviewer feedback).
